drl:
rule "R0"
salience -8
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T0(f2 matches "[b-t]?", f3 != false, !(f1 == true || f3 in (true, false, true)), $b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f3)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(2, $b0_0_1, $b0_0_1));
    insertLogical(new T1(-1, true, true));
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f1)
    $p1_1 : T0(f1 != true || f0 not in (100), f3 == $b1_0_0, $b1_1_0 : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_1.getF0(), $p1_1.isF1(), $p1_1.isF1()));
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.isF1(), $b1_1_0));
end
rule "R2"
salience 3
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f3 != true, f2 matches "zz" || f0 >= 2.0, $b2_0_0 : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p2_0.getF0(), true, $p2_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R3"
when
    (or $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f3, f3 == false) $p3_0 : T0($b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f3, f3 == false))
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    $p3_0.setF3(true);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
salience($b4_0_0 - $b4_0_0)
when
    T0($b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f3)
    T1(f2 == true, f0 <= $b4_0_0)
    accumulate( T0(f2 > "beta", $s4_2 : f0); $a4_2 : sum($s4_2) )
then
end
name: fz_9003_6467
